title: Europe is subsidising its way into a deeper energy crisis
content: Energy crisis: Governments should replace blanket tax cuts and price caps with direct income transfers for vulnerable households, liquidity support and non-earmarked tax credits for exposed sectors, writes Judith Arnal, State Economist in Spain, in an opinion piece for Euronews.

title: Europe can't 'rule out' a war with Russia says Sanna Marin

title: Slovakia to vote in July referendum on scrapping lifelong payments for politicians

title: Crime rates in Germany are falling but sexual offences are significantly on the rise

title: Timmy, the whale stranded off Germany's coast, swims off and gets stuck...again
